title: CI: Multiarch manifest-list builds failing
body:
**Description**

Since Dec 11th. the daily Multiarch manifest-list builds have been failing with repository timeouts.  Notably, both the podman and skopeo repositories have a substantially similar build job using the exact same tooling but different `Containerfile`.  Neither of them has experienced any failures.  The failures are happening in a CI build run by Cirrus-cron, observable in daily monitoring e-mails.  However, they can be easily reproduced.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**
1. Open a PR with `[CI:BUILD]` in the title
2. Press the 'trigger' button (when it appears) on any of the test multiarch build tasks.

**Describe the results you received:**

The build fails with a repository timeout

**Describe the results you expected:**

The build consistently completes

**Output of `rpm -q buildah` or `apt list buildah`:**

N/A

**Output of `buildah version`:**

N/A

**Output of `podman version` if reporting a `podman build` issue:**

N/A

**Output of `cat /etc/*release`:**

N/A

**Output of `uname -a`:**

N/A

**Output of `cat /etc/containers/storage.conf`:**

N/A

comments.body: I wonder if this is/related to https://github.com/containers/automation_images/issues/243
